body: Here, I have removed the test for checking that some water vapor and condensate exists within the NonEq parameterization. I added the test to parcel so that behavior should not change there.
title: Remove NonEquilibrium clippings

body:
Closes #598

other:
* add `Manifest-v*.*.toml` to `.gitignore`
    * ignores e.g. `Manifest-v1.11.toml`
* add `[sources]` section to `docs/Project.toml` 
    * makes it so that when you instantiate the `docs` environment for the first time, the docs depend on your _local_ copy of `CloudMicrophysics`, as opposed to the latest release.

<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->

#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->

-->


## Content

-->

- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included
